# Net Leads

> Net Leads is a lead-generation marketing agency based in Toronto, serving service businesses across Canada, the US, Australia, and Europe. It turns SEO, PPC, Local SEO (GBP), and AI search into a steady stream of high-intent customers.

Net Leads builds revenue-focused search systems — SEO, Google Ads (PPC), Google Business Profile / Local SEO, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — for service businesses across Canada, the US, Australia, and Europe. Clients keep ownership of their website, ad accounts, data, and leads, with no long-term contracts. Reach the team at (888) 638-5323 or hello@netleads.io.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://netleads.io/): Lead-gen marketing agency for SEO, PPC, Local SEO (GBP), and AI search — serving Canada, the US, Australia, and Europe.
- [Services](https://netleads.io/services/): SEO, PPC, Local SEO, and GEO marketing delivered as one revenue system.
- [Pricing](https://netleads.io/pricing/): Package starting points, each scoped to the client's market and goals.
- [Case Studies](https://netleads.io/case-studies/): Real client results and the systems behind them.
- [About](https://netleads.io/about/): The agency's approach and philosophy.
- [Contact](https://netleads.io/contact/): Book a call or request a quote — (888) 638-5323.

## Case studies
- [Noblegreen Turf](https://netleads.io/case-study-noblegreen-turf/): 50+ qualified leads per month from a 15-site SEO portfolio layered with Google Ads.
- [Steel N Ink](https://netleads.io/case-study-steel-n-ink/): From 8 to 84 conversions in the first month after a Google Ads restructure.
